channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo: “You Shouldn’t Be Responsible for Some Guy Sexualizing You”
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo dropping truth bombs! 💥 Preach, girl! 🙌 #empowerment #oliviarodrigo

item.title: Tour news: The Chicks, The Tallest Man on Earth, Holy Wave, 6lack, Ink & Dagger, Desire / Johnny Jewel, more
item.description: 🎶 Tour alert! 🚨 The Chicks, The Tallest Man on Earth, 6lack, and more hitting the road soon! Who's ready for live music vibes? 🎉 #TourLife

item.title: Iceland Airwaves announce initial 2026 lineup
item.description: 🚀 Let's pack our bags and chase the Northern Lights! 🌌 Iceland Airwaves just dropped their 2026 lineup! 🇮🇸🎶 #MusicFestivalDreams

item.title: Gilla Band share new single “Giraffe,” plot fall North American tour
item.description: 🦒🎶 Gilla Band has us grooving with their new track "Giraffe"! Who's ready to catch them on tour this fall? 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #GillaBandOnTour

item.title: The Chicks to Tour Taking the Long Way for Its 20th Anniversary
item.description: Get ready to celebrate 20 years of The Chicks with a special tour 🎉 Who's joining the party? 🎶 #TheChicks #TakingTheLongWay
